ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Chicken, leg, meat and skin, roasted/baked
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
Chicken 87.5% [Chicken thigh, salt, _whey_ powder, onion powder, spices, sugar, herbs, yeast extract, garlic powder, spice extracts, acidity regulator: sodium carbonate; antioxidant: rosemary extract; flavourings, rice starch, glucose, stabilizer: triphosphates: thickener: processed eucheuma seaweed],
sauce 12.5% [rapeseed oil, water, spirit vinegar, modified starch, sugar, _egg_ yolks, garlic 1.8%, table salt, spices, spice extracts]
